label: Gutterlight Loft
description: Gutterlight Loft occupies a narrow upper chamber of The Prismatic Draught, its faceted walls tiled in dust-slick vitrified plates scored with the tavern’s calibration marks. A recessed sleeping niche is set into fused-silicate masonry, with a low slab dais and a fitted canopy of mirrored slats that holds the copper-white twilight in disciplined bands. An open, grounded gutter runs along the baseboards and into a small lens-drain basin, preventing electrostatic glass fallouts from accumulating in corners. A single slit-window of thickened prism glass admits the city’s seam-line glow without glare, throwing steady chromatic strata across the floor.
